title: The Man Who Had Power Over Women
original_title: The Man Who Had Power Over Women
overview: A successful talent agent enjoys the good life until his wife leaves him. Moving in with his friend and igniting an affair with the man's wife, he also acquires a difficult new client whose public image must be preserved at any cost.
